name: Grilled Flank Steak with Summer Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze 2 1/2 tablespoons lemon juice into a large, shallow dish.
2. Peel and mince the garlic; add it to the lemon juice with 5 tablespoons olive oil.
3. Add the flank steak to the dish, turning once in the marinade, and set aside for 15 minutes.
4. Mince the basil.
5. Thinly slice the tomatoes and put them in a flat dish with the remaining olive oil. Sprinkle with basil and season with salt and pepper; set aside.
6. Trim and cut zucchini lengthwise into 1/4-inch thick slices.
7. Heat the grill.
8. Season the meat with salt and pepper, place on the grill.
9. Brush zucchini and bread with remaining marinade, then place on the grill.
10. Grill the meat for 3 minutes, turn, and grill for another 3 minutes until the meat is medium-rare, zucchini is crisp-tender, and bread is toasted.
11. Slice the meat thinly across the grain.
12. Arrange the meat, zucchini, bread, and tomato slices on individual serving plates.
13. Spoon any meat juices over the meat and bread.
14. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
